product.title: Color Correcting CC Cream with SPF 25, Coverage Lightweight Foundation, Hydrating Serum, Even Skin Tone Makeup and Skin Care, Boost Radiance, Refine Skin Texture, Avoid Sun Damage (LightLight, 1PCS)
featureBullets: 1. Refreshing texture: It smells good, with a faint plant fragrance. The texture is Refreshing and easy to apply. It is a white lotion at the beginning, and it will change color after even application. The color can fit the skin tone very well, and it will not sticky or creasing, just like the skin that grows naturally.
2. Moisturizing effect: Color Correcting CC Cream can moisturize the skin, improve skin condition, enhance skin radiance, and make skin younger and more energetic.

3. Full-Coverage Foundation: Color Correcting CC Cream can be used as a primer before makeup, has a strong concealing power, and can correct various blemishes such as skin redness and acne marks. Can make the skin look flawless and better restore the original beauty of the skin.

4. Sun protection, Color Correcting CC Cream has sun protection effect, SPF 25, omits the step of applying sunscreen, and makes the makeup look better, Available in dark shades to adjust to your skin tone depending on the temperature of application.

5. Diversified functions: Color Correcting CC Cream suitable for lazy people, create a translucent base makeup in one step, save multiple makeup steps, and make going out quick and easy. It's so easy to use, even a novice can create the perfect base. Make it easier to be beautiful.
product.description: Correct your skin tone and create a light and transparent makeup easily Conceal your pores, cover your blemishes, and create a naturally perfect skin condition Moisturizing, lightweight creamy texture Refuse mask face, you only need a Color Correcting CC Cream, a must-have product for clear nude makeup, making you feel as moist as spring in winter Waterproof and sweatproof, the effect is long-lasting, so that the base makeup "doesn't change" all day long Rejuvenate the skin and let the beauty bloom How to use: After basic skin care, apply a thin layer with fingers to the skin at the last step, then watch the formula warm to your skin and adjust to your skin tone.

specification.value: Color Correcting CC Cream with SPF 25, Coverage Lightweight Foundation, Hydrating Serum, Even Skin Tone Makeup and Skin Care, Refine Skin Texture, Avoid Sun Damage
#30,818 in Beauty & Personal Care (See Top 100 in Beauty & Personal Care) #22 in CC Facial Creams

reviewsInfo.customersSay: Customers find the CC cream effective and appreciate its lightweight, smooth texture that makes their skin feel soft. However, the coverage and skin tone match receive mixed feedback - while some say it matches their skin tone well, others report it has no coverage at all. Moreover, the consistency receives criticism for being greasy, and several customers mention a weird smell. The value for money aspect also gets mixed reviews, with some finding it good value while others say it's not worth it.

reviews.reviewText: This stuff is fun. You put it on white and it turns to a peachy skin color--it is a warmer tone in my opinion (not a weird orange at all, but just a beige that is on the warmer side), so if you're super cool toned maybe it'd be bad for you? But it made me look alive and less tired. A bit glossy but it makes me look dewy--if I put a ton on, I do feel a bit greasy (but the same happens from sunscreen). and then I just pat my face with a tissue. But I prefer that to being too dry or cakey (which it is not). I like the ingredients it has, because it helps your skin with that plant stuff--Centella. It helps skin a lot. I started drinking centella tea recently for the health benefits, but I wanted some cream to put on my face also since it can help with wrinkles and a million other things for skin. And of course, the sunscreen is great! Sure beats that white-cast horrible face sunscreen. This looks like dewy make-up, is spf 25, while also helping your skin with the centella. And a good price as well.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on September 14, 2025

reviews.reviewText: I was surprised that I actually liked this! I ordered the light color At first it looked a little pink but didn’t last. The color does change to match my skin tone. It is light coverage so it’s just enough to even out my color and look very natural. I will add my Bare Minerals loose powder in medium beige if I want more coverage but for everyday it’s perfect. It’s tempting to rub it in more than needed because it’s white to start but don’t. Some video reviews show them putting a lot on but it’s not needed. I ordered a much more expensive brand at the same time and preferred this one so back it went. I’m definitely ordering more and might also order the dark just for fun to see how it works.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on December 8, 2025

reviews.reviewText: Not full coverage but still a good product
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 17, 2026

reviews.reviewTitle: Good finish, soft and light. Natural tone
reviews.reviewText: I feel that it is very greasy for my skin. I am one of those who like matte. I thought it would have more coverage, but it's fine if you want to use it light in the mornings.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 3, 2026

reviews.reviewText: It is very light and I love the coverage. It keeps my skin moisturized . I got light light but it is still a bit dark for my skin . But in general it is very good.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 7, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I had very high hopes for this cream and was extremely disappointed. I got the “light” shade and it looks orange! Doesn’t look good at all. The coverage is horrible.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on February 10, 2026

reviews.reviewText: I love how this CC cream evens out my complexion, whilst creating a barrier against UV. The cream gives a medium - light coverage to give an even and bright complexion, and there is a choice of shades as the cream changes from a white cream to a tone to match your complexion. I use this cream over a moisturiser, if I’m traveling on a short trip, it can be handy that this cream is also a moisturiser, and that when I combine it with a nice serum underneath I find it works fine without the need for a further moisturiser in my travel bag. I use this product daily. I find it’s easiest and longer lasting to pat it over my face and neck, and gently smooth it over for a nice even coverage.
reviews.reviewDate: Reviewed in the United States on May 22, 2025
